ideation: This animation sequence simulates the action of checking a wristwatch. It starts with both arms relaxed at the sides.  The right arm then lifts slightly, the hand approaching the wrist.  The right arm then bends at the wrist, simulating looking at the watch face. Finally, the arm returns to the relaxed position. The left arm remains largely static for contrast and balance. This sequence emphasizes the act of checking time, often associated with the watch emoji.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, waiting for time
right arm lifts slightly, hand nears the wrist
wrist bends to check the time, looking down
arm returns to rest, time has been noted
